title: drosera monantha
intro: Drosera monantha, also known as the single-petaled sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to produce a resin that contains droserol and other compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Drosera monantha include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve coughs and reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways. Drosera monantha can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine.
